completion_summary: Frozen model provider and adapter contracts, mapped all 28 operations to runtime model reachability, enforced shared-path ownership, added deterministic provider stub, and integrated structural reachability into the local release gate without changing World Law v0.3.
notes: Expanded by core maintainers to add the structural reachability audit to the local release gate and test that integration. The gate remains non-strict for declaration alignment until WF-110 re-freezes affected task contracts.
scope: Freeze model provider contracts and operation-to-model reachability evidence without changing World Law v0.3 behavior
